items.title: For 48 hours EcoFlow is offering the expanded 12.2kW DELTA Pro Ultra power station + a FREE trolley at $5,599, more
items.summary:
EcoFlow has combined its ongoing RV Season Sale with its usual EcoCredits Monthly Madness promotion, which is kicking off for the final days in May and includes a 48-hour flash sale with up to 59% off discounts. Alongside the WAVE 3 AC and dual DELTA Pro extra battery bundle, the only power station offer during this window is on the 12.2kWh DELTA Pro Ultra Portable Power Station with an extra battery and a FREE trolley at $5,599 shipped, beating out its Amazon pricing by $400. While this bundle carries a $9,397 MSRP for the station and two batteries setup, you can more often find it starting around $8,799, with Amazon having only ever seen it discounted as low as $5,698 (Black Friday) and otherwise keeping as low as $5,999 in 2026. Outside of some 2025 exclusive deals, the 36% markdown here is a repeat of some former flash sales that cuts $3,200 off the tag for another chance at the best price we have tracked directly from the brand.

items.title: Apple Reportedly Developing Its Own Anti-Snatch Measure For iPhones
items.summary:
Smartphone theft is a common enough problem that companies have developed measures to prevent perpetrators from having free rein over the user’s device. In the case of iPhones, Apple has rolled out features like Find My and Stolen Device Protection. Now, it looks like the bitten fruit brand is planning to add another layer of […]

It’s keeping down from its $1,799 full price for a little while longer, which we’ve been seeing more frequently down at this same rate since March.
